description: Ground-truth Q&A pairs for ElectroGadget Hub customer support

entries.query: What's the battery life of the UltraSound Pro X headphones?
I want to return a laptop I bought 45 days ago. Is that possible?
I need a refund for my broken headphones. Give me my money back now.
entries.notes: Baseline prompt will FAIL this — doesn't ask for transaction ID

entries.query: I found the GamerX 3080 for $200 cheaper at CompetitorMart. Can you match?
entries.notes: Baseline prompt has no price-match policy — should fail

entries.query: My TV stopped working after 8 months. Is it under warranty?
I need a good laptop for video editing under $1500
This is the fifth time I'm calling about my broken order #98765. I want to speak to a manager RIGHT NOW!
entries.notes: Baseline prompt doesn't have escalation procedures

entries.query: Where is my order? I placed it 3 days ago.
I returned my item two weeks ago but haven't received my refund yet.
Can you help me fix a bug in my Python code?
